label: Lupine Controls
description: Control the Lupine SL Grano F from the Karoo app or the in-ride field, with ride-aware connection handling and a Lupine-specific control surface.
releaseNotes:
* First public Lupine Controls beta for Karoo
* Replaced all Magicshine app metadata with Lupine branding
* Added the Lupine remote-style control surface with pairing feedback
* Included English and German app text plus updated install assets
